## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issues

Link related issues with keywords such as `closes #123` / `fixes #456`.
If no issue exists, write `N/A` with a short reason.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other (describe in Summary)

## Release Notes Label

Apply exactly one PR label in the GitHub sidebar:

- `release:feature`
- `release:fix`
- `release:improvement`
- `release:docs`
- `skip-release-notes` (internal-only changes that should not appear in release notes)

## Testing Notes

Describe how you verified this PR. Include key commands, scenarios, or screenshots when relevant.

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run test:unit`
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes

## Compliance

- [x] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [x] I agree to the Contributor License Agreement terms in `docs/legal/ICLA.md` or `docs/legal/CCLA.md`
- [x] I agree this contribution may be licensed under this repository's license terms
